mapper.select: select t.*,t1.data_auth_type,t2.parents dept_parents,t2.name as dept_name from castle_sys_user t left outer join castle_sys_post t1 on t.post_id = t1.id left outer join castle_sys_dept t2 on t.dept_id = t2.id where t.is_deleted = 2 and (t.login_name =#{loginName} or t.phone = #{loginName} or t.email = #{loginName})

SELECT t.*, t1.name create_dept_name, t2.name create_post_name , t1.name dept_name FROM castle_sys_user t left outer join castle_sys_dept t1 on t.dept_id = t1.id LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_post t2 ON t.post_id = t2.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 and t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.* FROM castle_sys_user t left OUTER JOIN oa_attendance_record t1 ON t.id = t1.user_id and t1.type = #{type} and t1.is_deleted = 2 and t1.create_time >= #{begin} and t1.create_time <= #{end} WHERE t1.id is null and t.login_name!='admin'

select * from castle_sys_user where id in
#{id}

select * from castle_sys_user
AND real_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
AND is_deleted=2

SELECT csu.real_name as realName,csd.name as deptName,csp.name as postName,csu.remark,csu.avatar as avatar, csu.id as id,csu.login_name as loginName FROM castle_sys_user csu LEFT join castle_sys_dept csd on csu.dept_id = csd.id LEFT JOIN castle_sys_post csp on csu.post_id = csp.id where csu.id = #{id}

select.if:
select count(1) from castle_sys_dept t join castle_sys_user user on user.dept_id=t.id where t.is_deleted = 2
and user.real_name like concat('%',#{realName},'%')
